About This Dashboard
What It Does
Short-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns (1d to 1y), SMA gate (above 30/50/100/200 day), ratio consistency across timeframes, and resilience on bad SPY days. Higher composite scores indicate stronger, more consistent short-term momentum.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: Momentum-Ranker Dashboard Today's data shows **WDC (Western Digital) commanding the top momentum ranking with a score of 95.4**, driven by extraordinary long-term returns of 906.51% over one year while maintaining exceptional short-term consistency—the stock is up 2.51% today, 10.39% this week, and passes all four moving average gates (SMA30/50/100/200). The ratio consistency scores are nearly identical across returns (96.69) and ratios (95.87), indicating WDC's gains are building sustainably rather than from isolated spikes, though its bad-SPY resilience score of 1.34 is notably low, suggesting it underperforms on market-down days. **GPRE (Green Plains Inc.) ranks second with similar strength in ratio consistency (4 passes) and all SMA gates cleared**, but shows a critical weakness: a bad-SPY score of 2.708 that is roughly double WDC's, meaning GPRE tends to suffer more severely when the broad market declines. Both leaders pass the momentum gate with clean signals, but WDC's superior SPY-relative performance (877.94% vs SPY's returns) and more defensive positioning on down days make it the more reliable short-term momentum candidate compared to GPRE's higher volatility and market
